description.value:
Frequency once per round

A special gland near your siphons produces a viscous ink that you can squirt at a foe within 15 feet. The target must attempt a @Check[reflex|against:class-spell] save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. The target then becomes immune to your Spray Ink for 1 minute.

Success The target is unaffected.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Dazzled] until the end of your next turn.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Blinded] until the beginning of your next turn and dazzled until the end of your next turn.
